title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 276.150 - Violation a misdemeanor
text:
276.150.  Violation a misdemeanor. — Any person, firm, company or corporation violating any provision of sections 276.090 to 276.150 shall be deemed guilty of a misdemeanor, and, upon conviction, shall be fined for each offense not less than one thousand dollars nor more than ten thousand dollars.
(RSMo 1939 § 14397) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 12739
